questionText: Do you collect information from your suppliers about the outcomes of any implemented agricultural/forest management practices you have encouraged?
questionKo: 귀사는 collect information from your suppliers about the outcomes of any implemented agricultural/forest management practices you have encouraged입니까?
sectorTags: Agricultural commodities, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry
simpleHelp: This demonstrates to data users that your organization is committed to working towards reducing the impacts of climate change by not only encouraging its suppliers to adopt practices with climate change benefits but also by assessing these benefits after the practices are implemented. Data users are interested to know whether your organization assesses the impact of its actions to address climate-related risks.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to 7.68.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "예" in response to 7.68.

guidance.text:
General 
You should select ‘Yes' if you collect information on the outcomes of any agricultural/forestry management practices that your suppliers implemented on their land encouraged by you
guidance.textKo: 일반 You 해야 합니다 select ‘예' 만약 you collect information on the outcomes of 하나 이상 agricultural/forestry 관리 practices that your 공급업체 implemented on their land encouraged by you

criteria.criteria:
Any option selected - 1.5 points
A maximum of 1.5/1.5 points is available for this question.

criteria.criteria:
'Yes' selected - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: '예' 선택 - 1 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.

simpleHelpKo: This demonstrates to 데이터 사용자 that 귀사 is committed to working towards reducing the impacts of climate change by not only encouraging its 공급업체 to adopt practices with climate change benefits but also by assessing these benefits after the practices are implemented. 데이터 사용자 are interested to know whether 귀사 assesses the impact of its actions to address climate-related 리스크.
